channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: 3 charged with selling about $200k worth of forged signed Jason Kelce memorabilia
item.description: Three people are facing felony charges after police said they allegedly sold fake signed Jason Kelce memorabilia, valued at approximately $200,000. 51-year-old Robert Capone of Philadelphia, 43-year-old LeeAnn Branco of Bristol, R.I, and 39-year-old Joseph Parenti of Cranston, R.I.
item.dc:creator: Alyssa Cristelli, PHL 17

item.title: The AP NFL MVP finalists are Josh Allen, Saquon Barkley, Joe Burrow, Jared Goff and Lamar Jackson
item.description: Josh Allen, Saquon Barkley, Joe Burrow, Jared Goff and Lamar Jackson are finalists for The Associated Press 2024 NFL Most Valuable Player award. Barkley, Burrow and Jackson also are finalists for Offensive Player of the Year and Burrow is also in the running for Comeback Player of the Year.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Mikaela Shiffrin healed from puncture wound suffered in ski crash, will race next week in France
item.description: Mikaela Shiffrin has recovered from her ski crash two months ago and tells The Associated Press she plans to return to World Cup racing next Thursday at a slalom event in Courchevel, France.
item.dc:creator: Pat Graham, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Sports radio legend thinks Melania Trump is 'stunning' but no fan of her hat at inauguration
item.description: Sports radio legend Mike Francesa reacted to first lady Melania Trump's outfit on Inauguration Day, saying he loved her style but was no fan of that hat.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Australian Open: Madison Keys upsets Iga Swiatek and will face Aryna Sabalenka in the final
item.description: Madison Keys saved a match point and upset No. 2 Iga Swiatek 5-7, 6-1, 7-6 (10-8) in a high-intensity Australian Open semifinal to reach a Grand Slam title match for the second time in her career.
item.dc:creator: Howard Fendrich, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Aggies make 16 three-pointers in bounce-back win
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Following its first road loss of the season, the Utah State basketball team shot the lights out at the Spectrum in a 90-69 victory over Nevada Wednesday night. Ian Martinez led the way with 23 points, making 7 of 9 from beyond the arc. Utah State was 16-of-30 (.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Sonoma State dropping all of its athletic programs due to $24 million budget deficit
item.description: The schools’ 11 Division II athletics programs will all cease operations before the fall seasons begin.
item.dc:creator: Mercury News staff and wire reports, The Mercury News

item.title: San Diego native signs with SDFC
item.description: Midfielder Luca de la Torre is coming back to San Diego to play for his hometown Major League Soccer team.
item.dc:creator: Domenick Candelieri, Fox 5

item.title: Jaguars GM Trent Baalke is out, clearing a path for Shad Khan to make another run at Liam Coen
item.description: JACKSONVILLE, Fla. (AP) — The Jacksonville Jaguars might not be done pursuing Tampa Bay offensive coordinator Liam Coen. Jaguars owner Shad Khan fired general manager Trent Baalke on Wednesday, hours after Coen backed out of a scheduled in-person interview with team executives.
item.dc:creator: MARK LONG, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Ludvig Aberg cards an opening-round 63 for a 2-shot lead at the Farmers Insurance Open
item.description: SAN DIEGO (AP) — Ludvig Aberg shot a 9-under 63 Wednesday in what he calls his favorite place in the world, taking a two-shot lead over Danny Walker and Hayden Springer in the opening round of the Farmers Insurance Open at Torrey Pines.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Ichiro Suzuki, CC Sabathia and Billy Wagner elected to Baseball Hall of Fame
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Used to leading off, Ichiro Suzuki got antsy when he had to wait. Considered a no-doubt pick for baseball's Hall of Fame and possibly the second unanimous selection, he waited by the phone for the expected call Tuesday. Fifteen minutes passed without a ring.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Australian Open: Iga Swiatek vs. Madison Keys and Jannik Sinner vs. Ben Shelton semifinals are set
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Iga Swiatek is dominating her Australian Open opponents the way no one has at Melbourne Park since Maria Sharapova in 2013. Swiatek's latest lopsided win came via a 6-1, 6-2 scoreline in the quarterfinals against No. 8 seed Emma Navarro on Wednesday. The No.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Evans' goal late in the third period completes Canadiens' rally past Lightning in 3-2 victory
item.description: Jake Evans scored the winning goal with 2:15 remaining to rally the Montreal Canadiens past the Tampa Bay Lightning 3-2 on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Four players with San Diego ties to play at 2025 Farmers Insurance Open
item.description: The 2025 Farmers Insurance Open kicks off Wednesday morning at Torrey Pines Golf Course in La Jolla with a purse of $9.3 million up for grabs over the four-day event.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: RSL signs Brazilian goalkeeper Rafael Cabral
item.description: SANDY, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Real Salt Lake has gone into South America to find its new starting goalkeeper. RSL announced the signing of Brazilian keeper Rafael Cabral Tuesday afternoon.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Here's why a Buffalo Bills fan ran 17 miles to get to the game
item.description: Buffalo Bills fans show their support for the team in all sorts of ways, and for one fan it's by going the distance.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Minkewicz, NewsNation

item.title: Travis Kelce makes NFL history in first game of three-peat quest
item.description: Travis Kelce is now the only player ever to catch at least 100 passes in seven straight seasons, including the postseason.
item.dc:creator: Dillon Seckington, NewsNation

item.title: San Diego FC players react to first week of practice
item.description: The "Chrome & Azul" are back on the training ground to finish off their first week of training, for the first time ever as a club.
item.dc:creator: Chase Izidoro, Fox 5

item.title: San Diego FC hosts first ever practice
item.description: It was a warm welcome as San Diego FC reported to training camp Sunday, Jan. 12 surrounded by season ticketholders and support groups, taking the practice pitch for the very first time on Monday.
item.dc:creator: Julian Del Gaudio, Fox 5

item.title: Return of Sammy Sosa a big draw for fans at Cubs Convention 2025
item.description: The convention promises a weekend of panel discussions, autograph opportunities and the appearance of one of the best all-time hitters, fan favorite Sammy Sosa.
item.dc:creator: Erik Runge, WGN 9

item.title: CMU baseball, softball picked to top RMAC in 2025
item.description: In the RMAC preseason coaches poll, both CMU Baseball and CMU softball were selected to top the conference.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Wisconsin nonprofit receives money to curb human trafficking during NFL draft
item.description: 'Awaken' officials, the local nonprofit receiving this money, said this is a great win for the whole community.
item.dc:creator: Paul Steeno, NewsNation
